title: Green Gas Support Scheme (GGSS) and Green Gas Levy (GGL): interim evaluation 2025
body: "This annual interim report is the second published output of the evaluation of the GGSS and GGL, reflecting and synthesising the findings from the second-year evaluation of their activities and outputs.  Areas of interest include:    GGSS administration  GGSS budget management  GGL administration   The report is structured around 3 GGSS and 2 GGL evaluation questions for the process evaluation. It covers:   the second GGSS process evaluation interviews the refined contribution claims for GGSS and GGL  updated analysis of scheme and levy application and monitoring data preliminary assessment of outcomes and impact   DESNZ commissioned RSM UK Consulting LLP, supported by Winning Moves and Ricardo Energy, to undertake this research.  See the Green Gas Support Scheme (GGSS) and Green Gas Levy (GGL): interim evaluation 2024.  "
